title: Phantom Rework
description:
Stronger phantoms the less you sleep, absorption buffs for enduring them.
Shields will stun them, and fire will remove them.
body:
# Usually, phantoms are just an annoyance that get disabled with a gamerule command.
**But, if there was a reason to deal with them, people might actually engage with them, so...**

- Every 3 days, phantoms will get larger and more dangerous. But, if you can endure them, you'll get a reward the next time you sleep.
- A permanent absorption buff, until you lose your extra hearts, The level increases with every 3 days, starting once the phantoms begin to spawn, you will get level 1 absorption.
- Both phantom buffs and the absorption buff cap at 12 days.
- Phantoms can also be stunned by blocking their attack with a shield, and will instantly disappear if they are lit on fire.
